_comment: Wage on-costs for the dashboard P&L. payroll tax + workers-comp -> overheads as oncost_rate x wages; owners -> corp payroll. See scripts/compute_wage_oncosts.py.
_caveat: oncost_rate is blended over only these months and carries some accrual/cash timing. Replace with Xero's actual annual (payroll tax + workers-comp) / total wages once a full year exists — it is a one-number change; everything reads this file.
